title: Spear Variety
description: This texture pack changes spears' appearances, giving them more variety
body:
This texture pack changes spears' appearances, giving them more variety! It features:
- wooden spear
- stone spear
- copper spear
- golden spear
- iron spear
- diamond spear
- netherite spear

This texture pack aims to make spears more interesting by giving them variants depending on their material.

I also HIGHLY recommend you use HestiaHearth's Spear Rotation Fix texture pack! This will make the textures work properly, you can use it without but the textures will be flipped.

https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/spear-rotation-fix/
